messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0004",
  "title": "2025年全球手游市场营销趋势洞察",
  "page_index": 7,
  "page_range": "7"
}

Section text:
2025年全球手游
市场营销趋势洞察01

message.content: This section functions solely as a title/header for the first segment of a report. It identifies the core topic (global mobile game marketing trends), the target year (2025), and the primary entity (mobile games). It contains no definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It can answer retrieval questions regarding the section title, the report's focus year, and its industry/geographic scope. All other requested content types are absent from this section.
